notes: Game works native on Linux. On Proton it works out of the box with DXVK (DX11 to Vulkan translation). Tested on Plasma Wayland.
title: Space Mercs

notes: Game works native on Linux (OpenGL). On Proton it works out of the box with DXVK (D3D11 to Vulkan translation). Tested with the new Mesa ACO compiler on Plasma Wayland.
title: Space Mercs
